subject: Litwick — small white candle-like creatures with blue flames on their heads, three visible in a warm indoor setting
description: Three small white candle-shaped creatures are visible in a warm, enclosed setting. Each has a soft rounded body with dripping wax texture, simple round eyes, and a small blue flame flickering atop its head. The background suggests a warm amber-lit interior space — the combination of the blue flames against the warm orange ambient light creates a striking contrast. The trio are arranged loosely, giving the image a gentle, almost social quality despite their ghostly nature.
foreground: three small white candle creatures with blue flames
